g.text: JST XH IS BENCH-PROTOTYPE ONLY; TALL/SNAG-PRONE FOR FINAL WEARABLE

g.desc: JST XH IS BENCH-PROTOTYPE ONLY; TALL/SNAG-PRONE FOR FINAL WEARABLE

g.text: POWER ORDER: J9 -> F1 -> +5V_FUSED / TP20 -> D1 -> +5V_PROTECTED / TP19 -> JP1 -> U2

g.desc: POWER ORDER: J9 -> F1 -> +5V_FUSED / TP20 -> D1 -> +5V_PROTECTED / TP19 -> JP1 -> U2

g.text: Power test-point pads, including TP20 / TP_5V_FUSED on the F1-D1 node, use provisional 1.5 mm KiCad footprints; accessibility, spacing, finish, and probe-slip risk require layout review.

g.desc: Power test-point pads, including TP20 / TP_5V_FUSED on the F1-D1 node, use provisional 1.5 mm KiCad footprints; accessibility, spacing, finish, and probe-slip risk require layout review.

g.text: J9/F1/D1/JP1/U2/C4/C5 fields and footprints are provisional selections only; no production land-pattern or wearable-mechanical verification is claimed.

g.desc: J9/F1/D1/JP1/U2/C4/C5 fields and footprints are provisional selections only; no production land-pattern or wearable-mechanical verification is claimed.

g.text: ESD PLACEHOLDER HAS NO SELECTED MPN OR POPULATED FOOTPRINT — DO NOT ADD AN UNVERIFIED TVS

g.desc: ESD PLACEHOLDER HAS NO SELECTED MPN OR POPULATED FOOTPRINT — DO NOT ADD AN UNVERIFIED TVS

g.text: EXTERNAL BENCH SUPPLY RETURN — VALID ONLY WITH J_PWR_IN CONNECTED

g.desc: EXTERNAL BENCH SUPPLY RETURN — VALID ONLY WITH J_PWR_IN CONNECTED

g.text: U2 DBV FOOTPRINT OVERLAY AND PIN-1 ORIENTATION ARE REQUIRED BEFORE LAYOUT; REVERSE-CURRENT/BACKFEED BEHAVIOR REMAINS OPEN.

g.desc: U2 DBV FOOTPRINT OVERLAY AND PIN-1 ORIENTATION ARE REQUIRED BEFORE LAYOUT; REVERSE-CURRENT/BACKFEED BEHAVIOR REMAINS OPEN.

g.text: DK AND PCB_glove SHARE GND ONLY THROUGH THE SIGNAL INTERFACE — CAMERA CIRCUITRY REMAINS BLOCKED/TBD

g.desc: DK AND PCB_glove SHARE GND ONLY THROUGH THE SIGNAL INTERFACE — CAMERA CIRCUITRY REMAINS BLOCKED/TBD

g.text: LAYOUT IS NOT AUTHORIZED — RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT

g.desc: LAYOUT IS NOT AUTHORIZED — RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT

g.text: DO NOT CONNECT DK +5 V TO +5V_EXT — DK +3.3 V IS NOT CONNECTED TO +3V3_IMU

g.desc: DO NOT CONNECT DK +5 V TO +5V_EXT — DK +3.3 V IS NOT CONNECTED TO +3V3_IMU

g.text: EXTERNAL BENCH 5 V INPUT, LOCAL +3V3_IMU LDO, AND TEST ACCESS

g.desc: EXTERNAL BENCH 5 V INPUT, LOCAL +3V3_IMU LDO, AND TEST ACCESS

g.text: U2 TLV75533PDBVR: EN TIED TO IN; CIN/COUT 2.2uF NOMINAL, EFFECTIVE >0.47uF; REVIEW REVERSE CURRENT

g.desc: U2 TLV75533PDBVR: EN TIED TO IN; CIN/COUT 2.2uF NOMINAL, EFFECTIVE >0.47uF; REVIEW REVERSE CURRENT

g.text: JP1 IS A BENCH-ONLY REMOVABLE CURRENT SHUNT; TALL/SNAG-PRONE AND NOT A FINAL WEARABLE CHOICE

g.desc: JP1 IS A BENCH-ONLY REMOVABLE CURRENT SHUNT; TALL/SNAG-PRONE AND NOT A FINAL WEARABLE CHOICE

g.text: DRAFT ONLY — NOT FOR FABRICATION — POWER BUDGET AND PROTECTION PARTS REQUIRE REVIEW

g.desc: DRAFT ONLY — NOT FOR FABRICATION — POWER BUDGET AND PROTECTION PARTS REQUIRE REVIEW

g.text: PPTC IS SECONDARY PROTECTION — BENCH-SUPPLY CURRENT LIMIT IS PRIMARY DURING BRING-UP

g.desc: PPTC IS SECONDARY PROTECTION — BENCH-SUPPLY CURRENT LIMIT IS PRIMARY DURING BRING-UP

g.text: F1 1206L010/30WR AND D1 B140-13-F ARE PROVISIONAL; INPUT ESD REMAINS DNP/TBD

g.desc: F1 1206L010/30WR AND D1 B140-13-F ARE PROVISIONAL; INPUT ESD REMAINS DNP/TBD

g.text: CURRENT LIMIT MUST BE SET BEFORE POWER-UP — NOT FINAL WEARABLE POWER

g.desc: CURRENT LIMIT MUST BE SET BEFORE POWER-UP — NOT FINAL WEARABLE POWER

g.text: EXTERNAL BENCH 5 V INPUT — PROTOTYPE ONLY

g.desc: EXTERNAL BENCH 5 V INPUT — PROTOTYPE ONLY

g.text: VERIFY D1 CATHODE BAND ORIENTATION BEFORE LAYOUT — K/PAD 1 FACES +5V_PROTECTED

g.desc: VERIFY D1 CATHODE BAND ORIENTATION BEFORE LAYOUT — K/PAD 1 FACES +5V_PROTECTED

g.text: VERIFY CABLE POLARITY: XHP-2 CAVITY 1 = +5 V, CAVITY 2 = GND

g.desc: VERIFY CABLE POLARITY: XHP-2 CAVITY 1 = +5 V, CAVITY 2 = GND

g.text: +5V_REG_IN SOURCE FLAG REPRESENTS J_PWR_IN THROUGH F1, D1, AND CLOSED JP1 — VALID ONLY WITH EXTERNAL BENCH SUPPLY CONNECTED

g.desc: +5V_REG_IN SOURCE FLAG REPRESENTS J_PWR_IN THROUGH F1, D1, AND CLOSED JP1 — VALID ONLY WITH EXTERNAL BENCH SUPPLY CONNECTED
